heading: Short title; “person” defined
label: 721 Short title; “person” defined
text: This chapter may be cited as “The Upper Mississippi River National Wildlife and Fish Refuge Act.” The term “person” as used therein includes an individual, partnership, association, or corporation.
notes: CodificationSection is a combination provision, the first sentence being derived from section 1 and the last from section 12, of act .June 7, 1924
Amendments1998— substituted “National Wildlife” for “Wild Life”.Pub. L. 105–312
amendments: Amendments1998— substituted “National Wildlife” for “Wild Life”.Pub. L. 105–312
